ideas.train.title: Japanese is like a train.
ideas.train.explanation: The important part often comes at the end. Keep reading to the last word before you decide what the sentence means.
ideas.think.title: Think in Japanese, not word-for-word English.
ideas.think.explanation: Japanese does not always match English word order. Try to build the idea in Japanese instead of translating word by word.
ideas.particles.title: Particles show relationships.
ideas.particles.explanation: Particles like は, が, を, に, で show how words connect. They are small, but they carry a lot of meaning.
ideas.daily.title: Short daily writing is powerful.
ideas.daily.explanation: Writing a little every day is better than waiting for perfect Japanese. One sentence today beats a perfect essay someday.
landing.badge: Build the habit, one day at a time
landing.hero.lead: Nihongo Diary helps Japanese learners build a daily writing habit with AI corrections, saved diary history, calendar tracking, and learning support from Obie.
landing.hero.subtext: No credit card needed · Free to start
landing.problem.label: The problem
landing.problem.h2: You've studied the grammar. You still freeze when you write.
landing.problem.body: Most learners read and listen far more than they produce. Without real writing and honest feedback, the same mistakes repeat — and motivation quietly fades when no one is there to say "close, try this."
landing.solution.label: The solution
landing.solution.h2: A small diary today beats a perfect essay someday.
landing.solution.body: Write a few honest lines in Japanese. Obie corrects them, shows you a natural version, and points out exactly what to fix. Save it, and tomorrow you do it again. That loop is how fluency is actually built.
landing.solution.li1: Write at your own level, from N5 to natural
landing.solution.li2: See corrections and a native-style rewrite side by side
landing.solution.li3: Keep everything, and watch the calendar fill up
landing.features.label: Features
landing.features.h2: Everything you need to keep writing.
landing.feature.ai.title: Instant AI corrections
landing.feature.ai.body: Get a corrected version, a natural native rewrite, and clear notes the moment you finish writing.
landing.feature.history.title: Saved diary history
landing.feature.history.body: Every entry and its corrections are kept in one place, so you can look back and watch your Japanese grow.
landing.feature.calendar.title: Calendar & streaks
landing.feature.calendar.body: See your writing days fill the calendar. A visible streak makes the habit feel real and worth protecting.
landing.feature.obie.title: Learning support from Obie
landing.feature.obie.body: Templates, key ideas, and friendly tips from Obie help you start writing even on the days you feel stuck.
landing.feature.level.title: Corrections at your level
landing.feature.level.body: Choose N5 to Natural and a correction style, so feedback matches where you are — not where a textbook assumes.
landing.feature.habit.title: Built for daily habit
landing.feature.habit.body: Three sentences is a great day. Nihongo Diary is designed around small wins, not perfect essays.
landing.steps.label: How it works
landing.step1.title: Write a few lines
landing.step1.body: Open today's diary and write in Japanese — as little as one sentence is enough to count.
landing.step2.title: Get natural corrections
landing.step2.body: Obie returns a corrected version, a natural rewrite, your key mistakes, and useful vocabulary.
landing.step3.title: Save and review
landing.step3.body: Keep the entry in your history and revisit the corrections whenever you want to reinforce them.
landing.step4.title: Watch your streak grow
landing.step4.body: Each day fills your calendar. Small daily writing compounds into real, lasting fluency.
landing.pricing.label: Pricing
landing.pricing.h2: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
landing.cta.body: Write one sentence in Japanese today. Obie will take it from there.
landing.footer.copy: © 2026 Nihongo Diary · A daily Japanese writing habit
landing.footer.disclaimer: AI corrections may not be perfect. Please use them as learning support.

tutorial.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to get started
tutorial.step1.title: Write your diary
tutorial.step1.desc: Tap "Write Diary" every day. Even one sentence in Japanese counts — small habits build up!
tutorial.step1.detail: Click "Write Diary" in the sidebar to open the editor. Write anything in Japanese — one sentence or a few words is fine. Consistency matters more than length.
tutorial.step2.title: Get AI corrections
tutorial.step2.desc: After writing, request an AI correction. The AI will fix your Japanese and explain each point in your own language.
tutorial.step2.detail: On the write page, tap the "AI Correction" button after finishing. The AI rewrites your text naturally and gives explanations in your preferred language.
tutorial.step3.title: Reading support
tutorial.step3.desc: Tap any Japanese word to see its reading. Furigana (tiny hiragana above kanji) helps you read without looking up a dictionary.
tutorial.step3.detail: On any diary page, tap "Show Furigana" to display hiragana readings above every kanji. You can also tap individual words to see their meaning.
tutorial.step4.title: See everyone's diaries
tutorial.step4.desc: The Feed shows public diaries from people you follow. Get inspired, encourage each other, and grow together.
tutorial.step4.detail: Navigate to "Feed" in the sidebar. You'll see public diary entries from your followers. Following others motivates you to keep writing every day.
tutorial.step5.title: You're all set!
tutorial.step5.desc: Go write your first diary entry now. Your Japanese journey starts with one sentence today!
